channel.title: bbcnews TikTok
channel.description: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from bbcnews

item.title: President Donald Trump urged Iranians to seize the opportunity to "take over your government" after Iran's Supreme Leader, Ali Khamenei, was killed in US-Israeli strikes. But how likely is this? #Iran #Israel #Trump #US #MiddleEast #BBCNews
item.description: President Donald Trump urged Iranians to seize the opportunity to "take over your government" after Iran's Supreme Leader, Ali Khamenei, was killed in US-Israeli strikes. But how likely is this? #Iran #Israel #Trump #US #MiddleEast #BBCNews

item.title: Is there more behind the identical messages being shared by influencers in Dubai? #Dubai #UAE #MiddleEast #Influencers #ContentCreators #BBCNews
item.description: Is there more behind the identical messages being shared by influencers in Dubai? #Dubai #UAE #MiddleEast #Influencers #ContentCreators #BBCNews

item.title: Civilians forced to flee from the southern suburbs of Beirut have woken this morning in shelters, cars, parks and relatives' houses. The IDF said it "will not tolerate any harm to be caused to the residents of the State of Israel". #Israel #Iran #Lebanon
item.description: Civilians forced to flee from the southern suburbs of Beirut have woken this morning in shelters, cars, parks and relatives' houses. The IDF said it "will not tolerate any harm to be caused to the residents of the State of Israel". #Israel #Iran #Lebanon

item.title: Tehran's residents tell BBC Persian "last night was the worst night" so far, after Israel launched fresh strikes on Iran on the seventh day of the conflict. BBC Persian is the Persian language service of BBC News, used by 24 million people around the worl
item.description: Tehran's residents tell BBC Persian "last night was the worst night" so far, after Israel launched fresh strikes on Iran on the seventh day of the conflict. BBC Persian is the Persian language service of BBC News, used by 24 million people around the worl

item.title: Sharaz Ali was given a whole life term for murdering Bryonie Gawith and her three children in a house fire in Bradford, meaning he will never be released from prison. #Bradford #UKNews #BreakingNews #BBCNews
item.description: Sharaz Ali was given a whole life term for murdering Bryonie Gawith and her three children in a house fire in Bradford, meaning he will never be released from prison. #Bradford #UKNews #BreakingNews #BBCNews

item.title: Nearly every sector shed jobs including healthcare, typically a source of strength, which was hit by strikes last month. #Jobs #Economy #USNews #BBCNews
item.description: Nearly every sector shed jobs including healthcare, typically a source of strength, which was hit by strikes last month. #Jobs #Economy #USNews #BBCNews

item.title: The US president posted on his social media platform Truth Social. #DonaldTrump #Iran #USNews #BBCNews
item.description: The US president posted on his social media platform Truth Social. #DonaldTrump #Iran #USNews #BBCNews

item.title: Look Mum No Computer will represent the UK at the Eurovision Song Contest in Vienna this May. #Eurovision #LookMumNoComputer #UK #BBCNews
item.description: Look Mum No Computer will represent the UK at the Eurovision Song Contest in Vienna this May. #Eurovision #LookMumNoComputer #UK #BBCNews

item.title: Etihad and Emirates airlines have confirmed they will be running a limited number of services from Abu Dhabi and Dubai to the UK over the next few days. #Travel #MiddleEast #UAE #Iran #Dubai #BBCNews
item.description: Etihad and Emirates airlines have confirmed they will be running a limited number of services from Abu Dhabi and Dubai to the UK over the next few days. #Travel #MiddleEast #UAE #Iran #Dubai #BBCNews

item.title: The retaliatory attacks came after the US and Israel struck Iran on Saturday, killing Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei. #Iran #Israel #US #Dubai #BBCNews
item.description: The retaliatory attacks came after the US and Israel struck Iran on Saturday, killing Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei. #Iran #Israel #US #Dubai #BBCNews

item.title: FBI documents summarising interviews with a woman who made unsubstantiated claims of sexual assault against Donald Trump have been released as part of the US Department of Justice's trove of Epstein files. The White House has said the allegations are "c
item.description: FBI documents summarising interviews with a woman who made unsubstantiated claims of sexual assault against Donald Trump have been released as part of the US Department of Justice's trove of Epstein files.   The White House has said the allegations are "c

item.title: Since Venezuelan President Nicolás Maduro was seized, many in the country credit the US for the release of thousands of political prisoners. Still, hundreds remain behind bars. #Venezuela #NicolásMaduro #BBCNews
item.description: Since Venezuelan President Nicolás Maduro was seized, many in the country credit the US for the release of thousands of political prisoners. Still, hundreds remain behind bars. #Venezuela #NicolásMaduro #BBCNews

item.title: Iranian officials have blamed the US and Israel for the attack, however neither country has accepted responsibility. Israel says it was not aware of any operations in the area, while US Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth said that Washington was still investi
item.description: Iranian officials have blamed the US and Israel for the attack, however neither country has accepted responsibility. Israel says it was not aware of any operations in the area, while US Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth said that Washington was still investi

item.title: A defiant turkey named Henry had a bone to pick with Cobb County police officers, as it refused to waddle off the road outside Marietta, Georgia. No police or turkeys were harmed. #Turkey #Georgia #Police #USNews #BBCNews
item.description: A defiant turkey named Henry had a bone to pick with Cobb County police officers, as it refused to waddle off the road outside Marietta, Georgia. No police or turkeys were harmed. #Turkey #Georgia #Police #USNews #BBCNews

item.title: Schools, a hospital and historic landmarks have been severely damaged since US and Israeli strikes on Iran began on Saturday, satellite images and verified videos show, as the number of reported civilian casualties grows. Defence Secretary Pete Hegseth sa
item.description: Schools, a hospital and historic landmarks have been severely damaged since US and Israeli strikes on Iran began on Saturday, satellite images and verified videos show, as the number of reported civilian casualties grows. Defence Secretary Pete Hegseth sa

item.title: President Masoud Pezeshkian made an address broadcast on state media saying it will not attack its neighbours "unless attacked first". #Tehran #Iran #Israel #BBCNews
item.description: President Masoud Pezeshkian made an address broadcast on state media saying it will not attack its neighbours "unless attacked first". #Tehran #Iran #Israel #BBCNews

item.title: Explosions have rocked Iran’s main commercial airport overnight, with eyewitnesses reporting a burning plane on the tarmac. #Iran #US #Israel #MiddleEast #News #BBCNews
item.description: Explosions have rocked Iran’s main commercial airport overnight, with eyewitnesses reporting a burning plane on the tarmac. #Iran #US #Israel #MiddleEast #News #BBCNews

item.title: Huntley had been serving a life sentence with a minimum term of 40 years for murdering best friends Holly Wells and Jessica Chapman in 2002. #Soham #Crime #Prison #HollyWells #JessicaChapman #News #BBCNews
item.description: Huntley had been serving a life sentence with a minimum term of 40 years for murdering best friends Holly Wells and Jessica Chapman in 2002. #Soham #Crime #Prison #HollyWells #JessicaChapman #News #BBCNews

item.title: Iran has been hit by another night of heavy bombardment, after Israel announced a new wave of strikes on what it called "regime infrastructure". #Tehran #Iran #Israel #US #MiddleEast #News #BBCNews
item.description: Iran has been hit by another night of heavy bombardment, after Israel announced a new wave of strikes on what it called "regime infrastructure". #Tehran #Iran #Israel #US #MiddleEast #News #BBCNews

item.title: There's been an explosion near Dubai International Airport – this verified video shows the apparent drone attack. Some flights are now taking off and landing at the airport, after authorities had earlier suspended operations. #Dubai #DubaiInternationalAir
item.description: There's been an explosion near Dubai International Airport – this verified video shows the apparent drone attack. Some flights are now taking off and landing at the airport, after authorities had earlier suspended operations. #Dubai #DubaiInternationalAir

item.title: Can’t figure out if it’s a cold or hay fever? 😩 #HayFever #Allergies #UKWeather #Spring #BBCNews
item.description: Can’t figure out if it’s a cold or hay fever? 😩 #HayFever #Allergies #UKWeather #Spring #BBCNews

item.title: Steven Millward, 38, placed a white powder in the women's glasses when they went to the toilet in a pub in Derby, UK, in 2025. He was handed a seven-month prison sentence, suspended for 15 months, at Derby Crown Court on 23 February. #Derby #Derbyshire #C
item.description: Steven Millward, 38, placed a white powder in the women's glasses when they went to the toilet in a pub in Derby, UK, in 2025. He was handed a seven-month prison sentence, suspended for 15 months, at Derby Crown Court on 23 February. #Derby #Derbyshire #C

item.title: Ami said she was in "unbearable pain" for up to 18 days a month. #Endometriosis #PeriodPain #WomensHealth #Health #NHS #BBCNews
item.description: Ami said she was in "unbearable pain" for up to 18 days a month. #Endometriosis #PeriodPain #WomensHealth #Health #NHS #BBCNews

item.title: Posts about “Red vs Blue” school wars have been spreading on social media... but they might not be what they seem. #SocialMedia #School #Students #BBCNews
item.description: Posts about “Red vs Blue” school wars have been spreading on social media... but they might not be what they seem. #SocialMedia #School #Students #BBCNews

item.title: US President Donald Trump said the US is doing "very well" in Iran. "It's been amazing," he said, adding that the US has knocked out "42 navy ships" in three days, as well as the Iranian air force and telecommunications. #DonaldTrump #USPresident #Iran #I
item.description: US President Donald Trump said the US is doing "very well" in Iran. "It's been amazing," he said, adding that the US has knocked out "42 navy ships" in three days, as well as the Iranian air force and telecommunications. #DonaldTrump #USPresident #Iran #I

item.title: Microsoft said the "next-generation" device would "lead in performance" and play both Xbox and PC games, in a departure from its previous machines. #Xbox #PC #Gaming #Microsoft #BBCNews
item.description: Microsoft said the "next-generation" device would "lead in performance" and play both Xbox and PC games, in a departure from its previous machines. #Xbox #PC #Gaming #Microsoft #BBCNews

item.title: Do you think social media should be banned? #SocialMedia #Indonesia #TikTok #YouTube #Roblox #Meta #News #BBCNews
item.description: Do you think social media should be banned? #SocialMedia #Indonesia #TikTok #YouTube #Roblox #Meta #News #BBCNews

item.title: Schools in England must give allergy awareness training to all staff for the first time, under new government guidance. #Allergy #UK #England #Allergies #School #BBCNews
item.description: Schools in England must give allergy awareness training to all staff for the first time, under new government guidance. #Allergy #UK #England #Allergies #School #BBCNews

item.title: Dozens of people have been killed in an Israeli military operation against Hezbollah in Nabi Chit in the Bekaa Valley in eastern Lebanon, officials have said. #Lebanon #BekaaValley #NabiChit #Israel #News #BBCNews
item.description: Dozens of people have been killed in an Israeli military operation against Hezbollah in Nabi Chit in the Bekaa Valley in eastern Lebanon, officials have said. #Lebanon #BekaaValley #NabiChit #Israel #News #BBCNews

item.title: Onlookers captured footage of the moment a tornado swept through the US state of Michigan, destroying homes and uprooting trees. #Michigan #Tornado #Storm #US #BBCNews
item.description: Onlookers captured footage of the moment a tornado swept through the US state of Michigan, destroying homes and uprooting trees. #Michigan #Tornado #Storm #US #BBCNews
